title: Peep
description: Little Bo Peep has lost her sheep. But now, they’re baaaa-ack for revenge.
altHero: Little Bo Peep in the dark, looking at a lamp post
alt1: Little Bo Peep walking down a dark, creepy path amongst dead trees and lamp posts
alt2: Little Bo Peep licking her finger near a sheep hoofprint
alt3: a sheep with sinister yellow eyes, surrounded by lots of other yellow eyes
alt4: Little Bo Peep, illuminated with purple light, running to attack
